evidence: Most of the 24 cross-industry samples complete within budget but high-risk and edge paths still need dedicated validation
Standard paths and read-only tasks are stable while dependency-failure and high-risk approval tasks still create rework

Suitable for internal demo and pilot preparation but not enough to prove post-launch trust
Least privilege and external send limits are explicit; high-risk production still needs security review and red team
